title: Auto-Research v3: Full Re-run with Verification
description: Re-run all 6 techniques on real PRs with evidence verification, 12-hour loop, cross-agent verification
notes: Live run complete: Meta-Harness +27 verified ✅, SWE-bench +28 verified ✅, SelfRefine red flag (+2 vs prior +17) ⚠️, Combined MISSING ❌

title: extendedthinking: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run extendedthinking technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.
notes: WA-001 confirmed +44, WA-004 and WA-005 used wrong PRs (6275/6276/6277 instead of WA-004/005) — need re-run

title: selfrefine: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run selfrefine technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.
notes: ⚠️ LIVE 3/3 but HIGHLY INCONSISTENT: +2 on WA-001 (small) vs prior +17. SelfRefine weak on small PRs. Deltas: +2, +24, +3 — avg +10.

title: swebench: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run swebench technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.

title: metaharness: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run metaharness technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.

title: prm: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run prm technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.
notes: ⚠️ Used wrong PRs: scored actual PRs 6269/6270/6273 instead of WA-001/004/005. Results not comparable.

title: combined: Run 3 PRs + verify
description: Run combined technique on WA-001, WA-004, WA-005. Generate logs, scores, cycle file. Verify evidence.

title: verifier-agent: Cross-verify all results
description: After all techniques complete, verify each cycle file has matching log + score evidence. Flag any missing artifacts.

title: coordinator: Orchestrate 12h loop
description: Monitor progress, assign work to agents, handle failures, report to user every 2h
